name: Prefabricated Industrial Shed
description:
A prefabricated industrial shed arrives as a finished steel structure — fabricated and quality-checked at our plant, then dispatched and bolted down on your site, instead of being cut and welded from raw steel on the ground. The unit on this page measures 10 × 20 × 14 ft, sits on a mild steel frame, and is clad in PUF sandwich panels, priced at ₹5,85,000 inclusive of taxes. It is sized for workshops, tool and equipment stores, small production bays, and site equipment shelters where you want a closed, insulated structure standing within days of delivery.

That fast, finished delivery is the whole point of buying prefabricated rather than building conventionally — so it helps to be clear on what "prefabricated" actually changes.

What a prefabricated industrial shed actually is

A prefabricated industrial shed is a steel-framed shed whose components — frame, wall panels, roof sheets, and doors — are manufactured in a factory to set dimensions, then transported and bolted together on site. Because the parts arrive ready, on-site work becomes assembly rather than construction, which is what makes a prefabricated shed go up far faster than a built-in-place one.

Factory-made panels and frame are bolted together on site, turning construction into quick assembly.

The distinction that matters to a buyer is factory-built versus site-built. A conventional shed is welded and clad on your plot over several weeks, with labour, weather, and material wastage all happening on site. A factory-built steel shed is cut, drilled, and finished under controlled conditions, so the only site activity is foundation prep and bolting. You get a predictable structure and a predictable date.

Why it costs more than a ₹200/sq ft tin shed

Most online listings quote a prefabricated shed at ₹150 to ₹350 per square foot. Those numbers describe a bare tin shed — a steel frame with a profiled roofing sheet, usually open-sided and uninsulated. It keeps the rain off and little else. This unit is a different product class: it is fully enclosed in PUF sandwich panels, so the walls are insulated and weatherproof, the inside stays usable in heat and monsoon, and the structure is a sealed room rather than a covered area.

Fully enclosed PUF-panel walls keep the interior dry and usable, unlike an open tin shelter.

Comparing the two on price per square foot is comparing a finished, insulated pre-engineered shed against an open shelter — the per-foot figure was never measuring the same thing. The PUF panel and the full cladding are where the cost and the value sit.

The 10×20×14 ft prefabricated shed: full specification

This is the configuration the unit ships in. Every figure below is what you receive at the listed price.

Floor size 10 × 20 ft (200 sq ft)
Height 14 ft
Frame Mild steel, bolted connections
Walls PUF sandwich panels (insulated)
Roof Profiled steel roofing sheet
Access & ventilation Personnel door + ventilation provision
Finish Factory-painted, weatherproof cladding
Relocations Dismantlable and re-erectable
Dispatch Single-batch dispatch after order confirmation
Price ₹5,85,000 (inclusive of taxes)

The compact 200 sq ft single-bay footprint, raised on a concrete plinth in an industrial estate.

The 10 × 20 ft footprint is a working size for a single-bay workshop or a secured equipment store. If your plot or use needs a different size, the same build method applies to other dimensions on order — covered in the questions below.

When a prefabricated shed is the right choice

Choose a readymade industrial shed like this one when you want a finished, insulated, closed structure on a small-to-mid footprint, standing fast, and movable if your site changes later. It is the right call for a workshop, a store, or a compact production bay where the decision is "I need a sound building, quickly" rather than "I need a custom engineering project."

In use as a single-bay workshop, the right choice when you need a sound building quickly.

If your requirement is a large structure priced per square foot — a factory floor or a wide-span building sized in thousands of square feet — that sits in SAMAN's full industrial shed range, where spans are engineered to your drawing. If the job is dedicated covered storage at warehouse scale, our prefabricated warehouses cover that application specifically. And if the deciding factor for you is structural steel grade and profile rather than the finished unit, the steel sheds page sets out the material options. Tell us the use and we will point you to the right one.

Prefabricated industrial shed: common questions

Shipped as a single batch and bolt-down ready — the same build makes it relocatable later.

How long does it take to install a prefabricated industrial shed?

Once the foundation is ready, the unit is bolted up and closed in a matter of days, because it ships as finished components rather than being built from raw steel on site. The longer part of the timeline is fabrication and dispatch, which is confirmed at the quote stage; the site work itself is short.

Can a prefabricated shed be dismantled and relocated?

Yes. The frame is bolted rather than cast in concrete, so the structure can be unbolted, transported, and re-erected on a new site. This is one of the practical advantages of a prefabricated unit over a permanent masonry building if your operation may move.

Is the shed insulated and weatherproof?

Yes. The walls are PUF sandwich panels, which provide thermal insulation, and the cladding and roof are sealed against rain, so the interior stays dry and usable through the monsoon and through summer heat. This is the difference between this unit and an open tin shed.

Can I order a size other than 10 × 20 × 14 ft?

Yes. The 10 × 20 × 14 ft unit shown here is one standard configuration. The same factory-built method applies to other footprints and heights — share the floor area and clear height you need and we will quote the matching specification.

Get a quote

Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859
Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
short_description:
10×20×14 ft Steel + PUF shed — factory-built, bolted on site, insulated & relocatable.
Size / Capacity
10×20×14 ft · 200 sq ft
Frame / Panel
MS frame · PUF panel
Price / Delivery
₹5,85,000 · single batch
Roof / Relocations

Insulated & weatherproof
Bangalore & Delhi NCR
